title: Robot Toys for Kids, 5-in-1 Remote & App Control Building Set | RC Wall Robot, Engineer Set, Mech Dinosaur Rechargeable Construction Kit Gift for Boys Girls Ages 6-12+ Years Old（520 PCS）
features: 5-in-1 Robot Building Toy – HiWEEGO Robot Toys lets kids build and play with 5 exciting models: Wall Robot, Engineering Robot, Mech Dinosaur, Tank, and Stunt Car. Each design sparks imagination, develops creativity, and strengthens assembly skills while providing hours of screen-free fun. (One model can be built at a time.)

Rechargeable & Powerful Performance – This robot building toy is equipped with a updated high-speed motor for smooth and exciting movement. Rechargeable design, no need to frequently reduce battery. The 2.4GHz remote control ensures stable, interference-free signals. (Robot rechargeable battery included; remote requires 2 AA batteries, not included.)

Remote & App Control – Kids can operate the robot set via the included remote control (up to 20m range) or through the mobile app. Featuring multiple control modes - path mode, gyro mode, one-handed or two-handed driving, and programming mode - this tech RC wall robot moves freely in all directions, forward, backward, left, and right, indoors or outdoors, bringing endless interactive fun.

Programming Educational Toy – This creative robot kit lets kids build 5 different models while learning engineering and physics concepts through hands-on play. Designed for kids ages 8-12, it helps enhance hand-eye coordination, refine fine motor skills, spark imagination, and develop logical thinking. The included app programming feature adds coding fun, fostering curiosity and a passion for math and science.

Ideal Gift for Kids – Looking for a fun and educational gift? This cool robot set captivates kids with its flexible design, remote control functions, and engaging play. Perfect for boys and girls ages 6–12, it offers hours of interactive fun with friends and family, fostering meaningful parent-child connections. An excellent choice for birthdays, Christmas, Children’s Day, and other special occasions.
description: Product Description HiWEEGO 5-IN-1 Robot Building Toys Kids ages 6–14 love toys that combine fun with learning, and our robot toys deliver both- gniting creativity, boosting problem-solving skills, and keeping young minds engaged for hours. Movable Joints and Adjustable Hand – Adds fun, lifelike interaction to the robot. 360° Rotatable Head – Flexible head design for dynamic movement. Rotatable Wheels – Smooth rolling for easy indoor & outdoor play. Made from high-quality, non-toxic ABS material, this robot building kit is safe, durable, and perfect for boys and girls ages 6–12. A great choice for birthdays, parties, Children’s Day, New Year, or Christmas gifts. 5-in-1 Robot Toys – HiWEEGO Robot Building Set can be built into 5 exciting models: Wall Robot, Engineering Robot, Mech Dinosaur, Tank, and Stunt Car. Each model is designed with durable grip wheels that let it move freely indoors or outdoors—forward, backward, left, and right - bringing kids hours of screen-free fun and encouraging productive, creative play. Remote & App Dual Control – This robotic kit can be operated via a 2.4GHz remote controller or through the free mobile app. The app features gyroscope driving, simulation control, navigation path, and STEM programming mode, offering kids multiple fun ways to play and learn. Note: Please scan the code on the package or instruction manual to download the free app
